SELECT log(value) FROM logs_test WHERE value > 0;
SELECT value, log(value) FROM logs_test WHERE value > 1;
SELECT (SELECT log(MIN(value)) FROM logs_test WHERE value > 0) AS log_min_value;
SELECT log(value) + 5 FROM logs_test WHERE value < 5;
WITH (SELECT AVG(value) FROM logs_test WHERE value > 0) AS avg_val SELECT log(avg_val);
SELECT t1.value, log(t1.value) FROM (SELECT value FROM logs_test WHERE value > 0) AS t1;
CREATE TABLE additional_logs (id UInt32, log_value Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO additional_logs SELECT id, log(value) FROM (SELECT rowNumber() OVER() AS id, value FROM logs_test WHERE value > 1);
SELECT a.id, a.log_value FROM additional_logs a JOIN logs_test b ON a.id = b.value WHERE b.value < 5;
